title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 54.090 - Oath to be taken
text:
54.090.  Oath to be taken. — The person elected or appointed county treasurer shall, after giving bond according to law, take the oath prescribed by the constitution of this state, which oath shall be endorsed on his commission.  The commission and endorsement shall be promptly recorded in the recorder's office of the proper county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13797, A.L. 1959 S.B. 66) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12135; 1919 § 9533; 1909 § 3754
